claim: Phase 0.1 PASS: lean/WallisFamily.lean L284 contains literal token 'simp [wallisStepFactor]' under the 'succ m hm' branch of theorem roadmap_closed_form (induction tactic body). Verified by direct read of the file at L270-300 + by grep over the working-tree copy WallisFamily_post.lean staged in this session.

Phase 0.2 PASS: bridge HEAD (4eb28c4b780f1622f313abd0444bb11ddcb54c74) shows ZERO supersession matches for any prior slot-148-E or slot-148.E or *L282* commit. Methodology = git log --all --oneline piped through Select-String for the alternation pattern '148\.?E|slot-148-E|L282'. PHASE 0 supersession gate PASS authorises a clean first fire (HEAD at start of session was e9490d3, pulled forward to 4eb28c4 between Phase 0.2 and Phase D by operator activity in adjacent sessions).

Phase A.1 PARTIAL: lake update mathlib downloaded 8399/8399 .ltar artefacts to C:\Users\shkub\.cache\mathlib\ (final progress line 'Downloaded: 8399 file(s) [attempted 8399/8399 = 100%, 17 KB/s]'), but 7801 decompression(s) failed with Windows 'Access is denied. (os error 5)' on individual .ltar paths. Final exit code lake_update_exit=1. Despite the cache decompression failure, lake-manifest.json was rewritten to mathlib rev 14b67616b702b038bad6d1e7182864e57ebb9249 (replacing the prior pinned revision that did not contain Mathlib.Analysis.Asymptotics.Defs export). Wallclock for lake update: roughly 78 minutes (started ~Phase A.1 enter, terminated mid-decompression).

Phase A.2 PASS-WITH-CAVEAT: post-update 'lake build --no-build' command does NOT emit any 'manifest' substring on stderr/stdout (Select-String -Pattern 'manifest' count = 0 over the captured log). The manifest-out-of-date warning that frozen the original in-CLI fire at 117B is therefore RESOLVED. CAVEAT: the same command now reports 'target is out-of-date and needs to be rebuilt' for at least three witnesses (Mathlib.Lean.Meta.RefinedDiscrTree.Basic [591/617], Mathlib.Util.AtomM [698/746], Mathlib.Logic.UnivLE [1210/1223]) and likely thousands more, because the failed cache decompression in Phase A.1 left .olean files missing or stale. Phase B.1 lake build therefore cannot proceed in finite wallclock without first resolving the cache-decompression-denied condition.
